introSection: Dragon Flight (Chinese: 飞龙在天) was a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Eontime World in Xiangfang, Harbin, Heilongjiang, China. It had a dark ride section in the middle of the ride.
fullText: Dragon Flight (Chinese: 飞龙在天) was a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Eontime World in Xiangfang, Harbin, Heilongjiang, China. It had a dark ride section in the middle of the ride.
